response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership in diverse projects, but lacks demonstrated experience in IT architecture design, UML, and client-facing advisory roles, and his German proficiency is only basic — a critical requirement for this role.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack leadership across multiple technologies and domains
Strong track record in mentoring, workshops, and technical communication
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No clear evidence of UML expertise or formal IT architecture design experience
Limited demonstration of client advisory or requirements management in consulting context
